content.text: Now let me read the serve.nu file:

[220 lines]
   1 | # serve.nu - stream yoke output to the browser via Datastar SSE
   2 | #
   3 | # Run with:
   4 | #   http-nu --datastar --store ./store :3001 ux/serve.nu
   5 | #
   6 | # Then open http://localhost:3001 in your browser.
   7 | 
   8 | const script_dir = path self | path dirname
   9 | 
  10 | use http-nu/router *
  11 | use http-nu/datastar *
  12 | use http-nu/html *
  13 | 
  14 | source render-gemini.nu
  15 | 
  16 | const DEFAULT_MODEL = "gemini-3-flash-preview"
  17 | 
  18 | def styles [] {
  19 |   let theme_css = .highlight theme Dracula
  20 |   [
  21 |     (STYLE $theme_css)
  22 |     (STYLE "
  23 |       body { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; max-width: 48rem; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 0 1rem; }
  24 |       input[type=text] { flex: 1; padding: 0.5rem; font-size: 1rem; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 0.25rem; }
  25 |       button { padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font-size: 1rem; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 0.25rem; border: 1px solid #ccc; }
  26 |       nav { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  27 |       nav a { font-size: 0.875rem; color: #666; text-decoration: none; }
  28 |       nav a:hover { color: #333; }
  29 |       @keyframes blink { 50% { opacity: 0; } }
  30 |       pre { border-radius: 0.5rem; padding: 1rem; overflow-x: auto; }
  31 |       code { font-size: 0.8125rem; }
  32 |       .run-item { padding: 0.75rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; cursor: pointer; }
  33 |       .run-item:hover { background: #f8f8f8; }
  34 |       .run-item .prompt { font-size: 0.875rem; }
  35 |       .run-item .meta { font-size: 0.75rem; color: #888; margin-top: 0.25rem; }
  36 |     ")
  37 |   ]
  38 | }
  39 | 
  40 | def nav-bar [...right] {
  41 |   NAV [
  42 |     (H1 (A {href: "/", style: "text-decoration: none; color: inherit;"} "yoke"))
  43 |     (DIV {style: "display: flex; gap: 1rem; align-items: center;"} ...$right)
  44 |   ]
  45 | }
  46 | 
  47 | def page [] {
  48 |   HTML (
  49 |     HEAD
  50 |       (META {charset: "utf-8"})
  51 |       (META {name: "viewport", content: "width=device-width, initial-scale=1"})
  52 |       (TITLE "yoke")
  53 |       (SCRIPT-DATASTAR)
  54 |       ...(styles)
  55 |   ) (
  56 |     BODY
  57 |       (nav-bar (A {href: "/runs"} "history") (A {href: "/code"} "source"))
  58 |       (DIV {style: "display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem;"}
  59 |         (INPUT {
  60 |           type: "text",
  61 |           placeholder: "ask something...",
  62 |           "data-bind": "prompt",
  63 |           value: ""
  64 |         })
  65 |         (BUTTON {
  66 |           "data-on:click": "$prompt && @get('/sse')"
  67 |         } "send")
  68 |       )
  69 |       (P {style: "color: #888; font-size: 0.75rem; margin-top: 0.5rem;"}
  70 |         (LABEL "model: ")
  71 |         (INPUT {
  72 |           type: "text",
  73 |           "data-bind": "model",
  74 |           value: $DEFAULT_MODEL,
  75 |           style: "width: 20rem; font-size: 0.75rem; padding: 0.25rem;"
  76 |         })
  77 |       )
  78 |       (DIV {id: "output"} "")
  79 |   )
  80 | }
  81 | 
  82 | def runs-page [] {
  83 |   let runs = .cat -T run | reverse | each {|frame|
  84 |     let content = .cas $frame.hash
  85 |     let lines = $content | lines | each { from json }
  86 |     let user_msg = $lines | where { $in.role? == "user" } | first
  87 |     let assistant_msg = $lines | where { $in.role? == "assistant" } | get -i 0
  88 |     let prompt = $user_msg.content?
  89 |       | default []
  90 |       | where { $in.type? == "text" }
  91 |       | get -i 0
  92 |       | get -i text
  93 |       | default "(no prompt)"
  94 |     let model = $assistant_msg.model? | default ""
  95 |     let preview = if ($prompt | str length) > 80 {
  96 |       ($prompt | str substring 0..80) + "..."
  97 |     } else {
  98 |       $prompt
  99 |     }
 100 |     {id: $frame.id, prompt: $preview, model: $model}
 101 |   }
 102 | 
 103 |   HTML (
 104 |     HEAD
 105 |       (META {charset: "utf-8"})
 106 |       (META {name: "viewport", content: "width=device-width, initial-scale=1"})
 107 |       (TITLE "yoke - history")
 108 |       (SCRIPT-DATASTAR)
 109 |       ...(styles)
 110 |   ) (
 111 |     BODY
 112 |       (nav-bar (A {href: "/"} "new"))
 113 |       (DIV {
 114 |         $runs | each {|run|
 115 |           A {href: $"/run/($run.id)", class: "run-item", style: "display: block; text-decoration: none; color: inherit;"} [
 116 |             (DIV {class: "prompt"} $run.prompt)
 117 |             (DIV {class: "meta"} $run.model)
 118 |           ]
 119 |         }
 120 |       })
 121 |   )
 122 | }
 123 | 
 124 | def run-page [id: string] {
 125 |   let frame = .get $id
 126 |   let content = .cas $frame.hash
 127 |   let lines = $content | lines | each { from json }
 128 |   let assistant_msg = $lines | where { $in.role? == "assistant" } | get -i 0
 129 | 
 130 |   if $assistant_msg == null {
 131 |     return "run not found"
 132 |   }
 133 | 
 134 |   let text = $assistant_msg.content?
 135 |     | default []
 136 |     | where { $in.type? == "text" }
 137 |     | get text?
 138 |     | compact
 139 |     | str join ""
 140 |   let usage = $assistant_msg.usage? | default {}
 141 |   let model = $assistant_msg.model? | default ""
 142 |   let meta = $assistant_msg.metadata? | default null
 143 | 
 144 |   let card = if $meta != null {
 145 |     render-finished $text $model $usage --metadata $meta
 146 |   } else {
 147 |     render-finished $text $model $usage
 148 |   }
 149 | 
 150 |   HTML (
 151 |     HEAD
 152 |       (META {charset: "utf-8"})
 153 |       (META {name: "viewport", content: "width=device-width, initial-scale=1"})
 154 |       (TITLE $"yoke - ($id)")
 155 |       ...(styles)
 156 |   ) (
 157 |     BODY
 158 |       (nav-bar (A {href: "/runs"} "history") (A {href: "/"} "new"))
 159 |       $card
 160 |   )
 161 | }
 162 | 
 163 | def code-page [] {
 164 |   let source = open ($script_dir | path join serve.nu)
 165 |   let highlighted = $source | .highlight nu
 166 |   let theme_css = .highlight theme Dracula
 167 | 
 168 |   HTML (
 169 |     HEAD
 170 |       (META {charset: "utf-8"})
 171 |       (META {name: "viewport", content: "width=device-width, initial-scale=1"})
 172 |       (TITLE "yoke - source")
 173 |       (STYLE "
 174 |         body { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; max-width: 48rem; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 0 1rem; }
 175 |         nav { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
 176 |         nav a { font-size: 0.875rem; color: #666; text-decoration: none; }
 177 |         nav a:hover { color: #333; }
 178 |         pre { padding: 1rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 0.8125rem; line-height: 1.6; }
 179 |       ")
 180 |       (STYLE $theme_css)
 181 |   ) (
 182 |     BODY
 183 |       (nav-bar (A {href: "/"} "back"))
 184 |       (PRE {class: "code"} (CODE $highlighted))
 185 |   )
 186 | }
 187 | 
 188 | def handle-sse [req: record] {
 189 |   let signals = $in | from datastar-signals $req
 190 |   let prompt = $signals.prompt? | default ""
 191 |   let model = $signals.model? | default $DEFAULT_MODEL
 192 | 
 193 |   if ($prompt | is-empty) {
 194 |     {data: "no prompt"} | to sse
 195 |     return
 196 |   }
 197 | 
 198 |   yoke --provider gemini --model $model --tools web_search $prompt
 199 |     | lines
 200 |     | tee {
 201 |         where { ($in | from json).role? != null }
 202 |         | str join "\n"
 203 |         | .append run
 204 |       }
 205 |     | render yoke-stream -m $model
 206 |     | to sse
 207 | }
 208 | 
 209 | {|req|
 210 |   dispatch $req [
 211 |     (route {path: "/"} {|req ctx| page})
 212 |     (route {path: "/runs"} {|req ctx| runs-page})
 213 |     (route {path-matches: "/run/:id"} {|req ctx| run-page $ctx.id})
 214 |     (route {path: "/code"} {|req ctx| code-page})
 215 |     (route {path: "/sse"} {|req ctx| handle-sse $req})
 216 |     (route true {|req ctx|
 217 |       "not found" | metadata set { merge {'http.response': {status: 404}} }
 218 |     })
 219 |   ]
 220 | }

  65 |         (BUTTON {

The `serve.nu` file has **220 lines**. It's a Nushell script that serves
a web interface for the yoke system using Datastar SSE (Server-Sent
Events). The script provides functionality for streaming yoke output to a browser,

content.text:
The files in `/root/yoke/ux/` are:
1. `render-gemini.nu`
2. `serve.nu` 
3. `tests/test-render.nu`

The `serve.nu` file has **220 lines**. It's a Nushell script that serves a web interface for the yoke system using Datastar SSE (Server-Sent Events). The script provides functionality for streaming yoke output to a browser, including a main page with input fields, a history page showing previous runs, individual run pages, and a source code viewer.
